result:
Got everything I need. Let me compile the final assessment.

Key observations:
- Fix at `health_check.py:374`: mode-guard skips `max_tokens` injection for `image_generation` only
- `_filter_model_params` (health_check_utils.py:8) only strips `messages`, NOT `max_tokens` — so injected `max_tokens` flows through to all other non-chat handlers too
- `ahealth_check` supports 11 modes; `embedding`, `audio_transcription`, `audio_speech`, `video_generation`, `rerank`, `ocr` all use `_filter_model_params` and don't accept `max_tokens` either — same bug, unfixed
- Health check is background/on-demand, NOT on `/v1/*` hot path — zero RPS impact
- Fix is correct and minimal for the stated case; no new regressions introduced

{"linked_issue":null,"fix_shapes":["mode_or_branch_gated_guard"],"merge_gate":{"safe_for_high_rps_gateway":"yes","one_liner":"Safe to merge: health check path only, fix correctly skips max_tokens injection for image_generation, introduces no new failures; sibling non-chat modes (embedding, audio_transcription, rerank, ocr, video_generation) have the same pre-existing bug but this PR does not worsen them.","unintended_consequences":["Previously-failing image_generation health checks now succeed; cooldown state for those deployments resets on next cycle — expected and desirable, but operators relying on the unhealthy signal to route around dall-e/gpt-image-1 will see those endpoints flip to healthy on next probe."],"hot_path_notes":["_update_litellm_params_for_health_check is called only from _run_model_health_check (background loop) and _health_endpoints.py:1531 (on-demand /health); zero latency impact on /v1/* request path."],"what_would_make_yes":"Already yes. File a follow-up: extend the mode guard (or replace per-mode exclusions with an allowlist like {'chat','completion','responses'}) to cover embedding, audio_transcription, audio_speech, video_generation, rerank, ocr — they share identical injection path and _filter_model_params only strips 'messages', not 'max_tokens'."},"findings":[{"regression_archetype":"narrow_fix_missed_class","bug_class":"max_tokens injected for non-chat health check modes that reject the field","fix_locus":"litellm/proxy/health_check.py:_update_litellm_params_for_health_check","sibling_loci":["litellm/litellm_core_utils/health_check_utils.py:6-8","litellm/litellm_core_utils/health_check_helpers.py:163-218"],"evidence":["litellm/proxy/health_check.py:373-379 — max_tokens guard covers only image_generation; messages always injected then cleaned by _filter_model_params","litellm/litellm_core_utils/health_check_utils.py:6-8 — _filter_model_params strips only 'messages'; max_tokens passes through to all handlers unchanged","litellm/litellm_core_utils/health_check_helpers.py:163-218 — embedding, audio_transcription, audio_speech, video_generation, rerank, ocr all call _filter_model_params then their respective litellm endpoints; none of those endpoints accept max_tokens"],"breadth":"narrow_missed_class","recommended_fix":"This PR is safe to merge as-is since it fixes the reported symptom without introducing regressions. In a follow-up, replace the single image_generation exclusion at health_check.py:374 with a positive allowlist — only inject max_tokens when mode is in {'chat', 'completion', 'responses'} (modes that actually accept it) — rather than per-mode denylists that require updating for each new mode. Add regression tests for embedding and audio_transcription modes to lock in the fix."}]}
